description: Identification of who needs the explanation and why
review_question: Who needs this explanation and what action must it support?

description: Whether explanation reflects actual system behavior
review_question: Does the explanation describe the model or only sound plausible?

description: Whether similar cases receive similar explanations
review_question: Do explanations change unpredictably across nearby cases?

description: Whether the intended audience can understand the explanation
review_question: Is the explanation usable by its audience?

description: Whether explanation supports correction review or recourse
review_question: Can someone act on the explanation?

description: Whether confidence limits and unsupported uses are disclosed
review_question: Does the explanation prevent false certainty?

description: Whether data model evaluation limits and versions are documented
Whether people can challenge correct and appeal outcomes
review_question: Does understanding lead to a path for action?

description: Whether ownership monitoring escalation and remediation are defined
review_question: Who is responsible when explanation reveals a problem?
